APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, #7235

JEROD HENDRICKSON, Esq. for Plaintiff: ALLA SNEPER AS TRUSTEE OF THE ALLA SNEPER 1993 LIVING TRUST.
Plaintiff's Witness ALLA SNEPER & MICHAEL SNEPER was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant CHRISTOPHER POHLMAN.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 58C WOODWARD ST., San Francisco, CA 94103.

The lease is forfeited.

MEMO OF COSTS TO BE FILE AT LATER DATE

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JEROD HENDRICKSON FOR PLAINTIFF ALLA SNEPER, WHO IS PRESENT IN COURT. ANTHONY HECKMAN, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER POHLMAN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (502)

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Continued To Aug-10-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502
